title: Undergrowth
description: Undergrowth is a resource pack that introduces little bits of foliage, rocks, sticks, mushrooms and many, many more!
body:
**Undergrowth** is a resource pack that introduces little bits of foliage, rocks, sticks, mushrooms and many, many more! 

Here's the list of all things **Undergrowth** changes:

- Grass blocks, podzol and coarse dirt in forests, birch forests, dark forests, jungle, savannas, bamboo forests, taigas and old growth forests now have a chance to spawn leaf piles and sticks corresponding to the wood type that is most common to the biome.

- Grass blocks, podzol and coarse dirt now have a chance to spawn with a rock on the top.

- 3 variants of shells will now spawn on the beaches.

- Bracket fungus may now grow on birch trees.

- Bushes now have a chance to replace grass.

- Grass now has a new, shorter variant.

- Grass blocks in dark forests and mycelium will now spawn small mushrooms on them.
#
This pack requires **OptiFine to work**. Some textures or models may not appear correctly without them!
#
This resource pack is in **early development stage!** If you encounter a bug, please report it in the comment section or in my DMs. Due to the nature of the resource pack, some users may experience performance impact. This will be greatly reduced once the pack is completed. All feedback is greatly appreciated.
#
Also available on Planet Minecraft: https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/undergrowth-5887348
